mapper.select:
SELECT A.PERIOD_DIV_CD, A.EVA_YEAR, A.POOL_CD, EC.CODE_NM AS POOL_CODE_NM, A.POOL_CD_NM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ST_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ST_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ST_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'HH24:MI') AS ST_TIME, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ST_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'HH24') AS ST_HOUR, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ST_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'MI') AS ST_MINUTE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ED_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ED_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ED_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'HH24:MI') AS ED_TIME, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ED_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'HH24') AS ED_HOUR, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ED_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'MI') AS ED_MINUTE, A.STATUS_CD, COUNT(B.PERIOD_DIV_CD) AS APPLICATION_COUNT FROM EVA_POOL_SCHE A LEFT OUTER JOIN EVA_POOL_APPL B ON A.PERIOD_DIV_CD = B.PERIOD_DIV_CD AND A.EVA_YEAR = B.EVA_YEAR AND A.POOL_CD = B.POOL_CD AND B.APPL_YN = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN EVA_CODE EC ON A.POOL_CD = EC.ORG_CD AND EC.GROUP_CD = 'POOL_CD' GROUP BY A.PERIOD_DIV_CD, A.EVA_YEAR, A.POOL_CD, EC.CODE_NM, A.POOL_CD_NM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ST_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ST_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'HH24:MI'), TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ST_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'HH24'), TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ST_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'MI'), TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ED_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ED_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'HH24:MI'), TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ED_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'HH24'), TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.ED_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), 'MI'), A.STATUS_CD ORDER BY A.PERIOD_DIV_CD DESC, A.EVA_YEAR DESC, A.POOL_CD DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVA_POOL_SCHE ( PERIOD_DIV_CD, EVA_YEAR, POOL_CD, POOL_CD_NM, ST_DT, ED_DT, STATUS_CD, INPT_ID, INPT_DT ) VALUES ( #{periodDivCd}, #{evaYear}, #{poolCd}, #{poolCdNm}, #{startDateTime}, #{endDateTime}, #{statusCd}, #{usrId}, sysdate )
mapper.select: SELECT CODE , CODE_NM , ORG_CD FROM EVA_CODE WHERE GROUP_CD ='POOL_CD' AND ORG_CD IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CODE

SELECT PM.DI, PM.ROLE, PM.USR_ID, PM.PRIV_YN, PM.PRIV_DTTM, PM.QUAN_YN, PM.QUAL_YN, PM.NAME, PM.GENDER, PM.TEL_HP, PM.BIRTHDAY, PM.UNIV_CD, (SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE UNIV_CD = PM.UNIV_CD) AS UNIV_NM, PM.POSITION, PM.DEPT, PM.EMAIL, PM.RESUME_1, PM.RESUME_2, PM.JOB_CD, CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(PM.JOB_CD) = '1' THEN '교수' WHEN TO_CHAR(PM.JOB_CD) = '2' THEN '교직원' ELSE '기타' END AS JOB_TITLE, PM.UNIV_DIV, CASE WHEN PM.UNIV_DIV IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_TYPE_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE UNIV_TYPE_CD = PM.UNIV_DIV) ELSE NULL END AS UNIV_DIV_NM, PM.CTPV_CD, CASE WHEN PM.CTPV_CD IS NOT NULL THEN (SELECT DISTINCT CTPV_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE CTPV_CD = PM.CTPV_CD) ELSE NULL END AS CTPV_CD_NM, PM.DEL_YN, PA.DISQ_YN_1, PA.DISQ_YN_2, PA.APPL_YN, PA.APPL_YN_DT, PA.SEL_RSLT, PA.SEC_PLEDGE_YN, TO_CHAR(PA.SEC_PLEDGE_YN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS SEC_PLEDGE_YN_DT, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN PDU.DISQ_DIV = '1' THEN PDU.DISQ_UNIV_CD ELSE NULL END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PDU.DISQ_UNIV_CD) AS DISQ_UNIV_CD_1, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN PDU.DISQ_DIV = '1' THEN (SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_NM FROM EVA_UNIV WHERE UNIV_CD = PDU.DISQ_UNIV_CD) ELSE NULL END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PDU.DISQ_UNIV_CD) AS DISQ_UNIV_NM_1, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN PDU.DISQ_DIV = '2' THEN PDU.DISQ_UNIV_CD ELSE NULL END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PDU.DISQ_UNIV_CD) AS DISQ_UNIV_CD_2, LISTAGG(CASE WHEN PDU.DISQ_DIV = '2' THEN (SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_NM FROM EVA_UNIV WHERE UNIV_CD = PDU.DISQ_UNIV_CD) ELSE NULL END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY PDU.DISQ_UNIV_CD) AS DISQ_UNIV_NM_2, EC1.CODE_NM AS A_UNIV, A.MAJOR AS A_MAJOR, EC2.CODE_NM AS B_UNIV, B.MAJOR AS B_MAJOR, EC3.CODE_NM AS C_UNIV, C.MAJOR AS C_MAJOR, PA.PERIOD_DIV_CD, PA.EVA_YEAR, PA.POOL_CD, PM.FILE_ID, MAX((SELECT ORG_FILE_NAME FROM EVA_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = PM.FILE_ID AND FILE_SEQ = '0001')) AS FILE_NM FROM EVA_POOL_M PM LEFT OUTER JOIN EVA_POOL_APPL PA ON PM.DI = PA.DI AND PA.PERIOD_DIV_CD = #{periodDivCd} AND PA.EVA_YEAR = #{evaYear} AND PA.POOL_CD = #{poolCd} LEFT OUTER JOIN EVA_POOL_DISQ_UNIV PDU ON PM.DI = PDU.DI AND PDU.PERIOD_DIV_CD = #{periodDivCd} AND PDU.EVA_YEAR = #{evaYear} AND PDU.POOL_CD = #{poolCd} LEFT JOIN EVA_POOL_DEGREE A ON PM.DI = A.DI AND A.SEQ = 1 LEFT JOIN EVA_POOL_DEGREE B ON PM.DI = B.DI AND B.SEQ = 2 LEFT JOIN EVA_POOL_DEGREE C ON PM.DI = C.DI AND C.SEQ = 3 LEFT JOIN eva_code EC1 ON A.UNIV_CD = EC1.org_cd AND EC1.group_cd = 'LAST_DEG_ACQS_SCHL_CD' LEFT JOIN eva_code EC2 ON B.UNIV_CD = EC2.org_cd AND EC2.group_cd = 'LAST_DEG_ACQS_SCHL_CD' LEFT JOIN eva_code EC3 ON C.UNIV_CD = EC3.org_cd AND EC3.group_cd = 'LAST_DEG_ACQS_SCHL_CD' WHERE PA.APPL_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY PM.DI, PM.ROLE, PM.USR_ID, PM.PRIV_YN, PM.PRIV_DTTM, PM.QUAN_YN, PM.QUAL_YN, PM.NAME, PM.GENDER,PM.TEL_HP, PM.BIRTHDAY, PM.UNIV_CD, PM.JOB_NM, PM.POSITION, PM.DEPT, PM.EMAIL, PM.RESUME_1, PM.RESUME_2, PM.JOB_CD, PM.UNIV_DIV, PM.CTPV_CD, PM.DEL_YN,PM.UNIV_DIV, PM.CTPV_CD, PA.DISQ_YN_1, PA.DISQ_YN_2, PA.APPL_YN, PA.APPL_YN_DT, PA.SEL_RSLT, PA.SEC_PLEDGE_YN, PA.SEC_PLEDGE_YN_DT, EC1.CODE_NM, A.MAJOR, EC2.CODE_NM, B.MAJOR, EC3.CODE_NM, C.MAJOR, PA.PERIOD_DIV_CD, PA.EVA_YEAR, PA.POOL_CD,PM.FILE_ID ORDER BY PM.NAME, PM.USR_ID

SELECT A.DI, A.PERIOD_DIV_CD, A.EVA_YEAR, A.POOL_CD, A.POOL_CD_NM, EC.CODE_NM, A.USR_ID, A.NAME, M.UNIV_CD, (SELECT DISTINCT UNIV_NM FROM E6_EDNST_ADDR_M WHERE UNIV_CD = M.UNIV_CD) AS UNIV_CD_NM, M.POSITION, A.APPL_YN, A.APPL_YN_DT, A.DISQ_YN_1, A.DISQ_YN_2, A.SEL_RSLT, A.SEC_PLEDGE_YN, A.SEC_PLEDGE_YN_DT, A.SIGN_1, A.DEL_YN, A.INPT_ID, A.INPT_DT, A.LAST_CHNRG_ID, A.LAST_CHG_DT FROM EVA_POOL_APPL A LEFT JOIN EVA_CODE EC ON A.POOL_CD = EC.ORG_CD AND EC.GROUP_CD = 'POOL_CD' LEFT JOIN EVA_POOL_M M ON A.DI = M.DI WHERE A.DI = #{di} AND A.PERIOD_DIV_CD = #{periodDivCd} AND A.EVA_YEAR = #{evaYear} AND A.POOL_CD = #{poolCd}
